2604.26258.title: FlowBot: Inducing LLM Workflows with Bilevel Optimization and Textual Gradients
2604.26258.paper_summary: LLM workflows, which coordinate structured calls to individual LLMs (each augmented with varying instructions and tools) to achieve a particular goal, offer a promising path towards extending the capabilities of LLMs and building powerful systems that can tackle diverse tasks. However, existing approaches for building such workflows generally rely on human-crafted pipelines and prompts, which presents a substantial bottleneck in real world deployment. How can automatically induce and optimize such workflows in a data-driven way? This paper describes a simple data-driven approach for automatically inducing LLM workflows. We formulate workflow induction as a bilevel optimization problem: an outer loop which optimizes a high-level sketch of the workflow (in particular how the LLM calls should be structured), and an inner loop which optimizes each individual LLM call one-by one. Both loops are optimized with ``textual gradients'' where for the inner loop we optimize each component in a modular way through ``backpropagating'' textual gradients layer-by-layer. We find that LLM workflows discovered through our \textsc{FlowBot} (work\textbf{flow} induction through \textbf{b}ilevel \textbf{o}ptimization and \textbf{t}extual gradients) approach performs competitively against strong baselines that make use of human-crafted or automatically-generated workflows.
2604.26258.paper_summary_zh: LLM 工作流程協調對單個 LLM 的結構化調用（每個 LLM 附加不同的指令和工具）以實現特定目標，提供了一條有前景的途徑來擴展 LLM 的能力並構建能夠處理多樣任務的強大系統。<lb/>然而，現有的構建此類工作流程的方法通常依賴於人工設計的管道和提示，這在現實世界的部署中造成了實質性的瓶頸。<lb/>如何以數據驅動的方式自動引導和優化這些工作流程？<lb/>本文描述了一種簡單的數據驅動方法來自動引導 LLM 工作流程。<lb/>我們將工作流程引導公式化為一個雙層優化問題：一個外部循環優化工作流程的高級草圖（特別是 LLM 調用的結構應該如何），以及一個內部循環逐一優化每個單獨的 LLM 調用。<lb/>這兩個循環都使用“文本梯度”進行優化，其中對於內部循環，我們通過“逐層反向傳播”文本梯度以模塊化的方式優化每個組件。<lb/>我們發現通過我們的 \textsc{FlowBot}（通過 \textbf{b}ilevel \textbf{o}ptimization 和 \textbf{t}extual gradients 進行工作\textbf{flow} 引導）方法發現的 LLM 工作流程在與使用人工設計或自動生成的工作流程的強基準進行競爭時表現良好。
2604.26258.author: Hongyeon Yu et.al.
2604.26258.authors: Hongyeon Yu, Young-Bum Kim, Yoon Kim
